rationale: Novel certified phase atlas approach; depth/completeness gaps identified by all 5 reviewers. Key missing: delta-bound proof (main technical deliverable), GP underspecification, no unified certificate format, large unverified TCB, insufficient evaluation.

key_improvements.title: GP surrogate: full specification, calibration, and pipeline integration
critiques_addressed: Yuan Cheng: GP lacks calibration guarantees, formal connection to coverage, scalability analysis
Sara Roy: GP severely underspecified (no kernel, acquisition function, calibration details)
key_improvements.scope: Fully specify GP with ARD Matern-5/2 kernel, integrate length-scale optimization via marginal likelihood into benchmark pipeline, add empirical calibration metrics (ECE), and demonstrate GP-guided vs uniform refinement speedup.

key_improvements.title: Unified certificate format with formal composition and regime semantics
critiques_addressed: Lila Zhang: No unified certificate format across verification tiers
Joseph S. Chang: No formal certificate composition rules for atlas construction
Aniruddha Sinha: No formal semantics for regime labels
All reviewers: regime label derivation being procedural rather than logical
key_improvements.scope: Define CertificateProofObject wrapping all evidence. Add formal certificate composition calculus. Formalize regime inference as logical derivation with proof tree. Reduce TCB.

key_improvements.title: Quantitative evaluation: ablation, scalability, baselines
critiques_addressed: Sara Roy: evaluation lacks quantitative metrics, ablation studies, baseline comparisons
All reviewers: no scalability analysis beyond 4 parameters
key_improvements.scope: Add quantitative benchmark reporting with ablation (uniform vs adaptive), add Repressilator 3-state model, extended metrics.

math_rigor_items: Verify Theorem B1 (delta-soundness) proof matches implementation in smt/delta_bound.py
Verify Krawczyk contraction argument in minicheck matches krawczyk.py
Add convergence proof for adaptive refinement (Proposition C1)
Add certificate composition soundness theorem (Theorem B2)
